message:
Fix nix fmt submodule root paths

Treat targeted submodule root paths with a trailing slash like the
existing bare directory arguments.

This keeps the generated argument list stable for both relative and
absolute paths and avoids passing an empty string to the submodule
local treefmt run.

files.patch:
@@ -21,13 +21,13 @@ pkgs.writeShellScriptBin "format" ''
 
     for arg in "$@"; do
       case "$arg" in
-        "$submodule_root")
+        "$submodule_root"|"$submodule_root"/)
           submodule_args+=(.)
           ;;
         "$submodule_root"/*)
           submodule_args+=("''${arg#"$submodule_root"/}")
           ;;
-        "$submodule_prefix")
+        "$submodule_prefix"|"$submodule_prefix"/)
           submodule_args+=(.)
           ;;
         "$submodule_prefix"/*)
